name: @pippit-bridge/mcp-server
description: Dependency-free MCP server and Codex plugin for Pippit account management, video generation, and reference-guided regeneration

scripts.build: tsc -b tsconfig.build.json --force && esbuild src/stdio.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --legal-comments=none --outfile=dist/plugin-stdio.mjs && esbuild scripts/local-facade-daemon-entry.mjs --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --legal-comments=none --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/local-facade-daemon.mjs
